label: Session
description: One Claude Code context-window's worth of work for a YAC (CASE-389). One record per session; identity_fields scoped to session_id so re-mirroring an existing session updates its body in place. Default entity versioning (PoNIF #2) retains snapshots as the body grows. `body` is the merged content of all *.md files in reports/<session-id>/ — composed role-agnostically by add-to-kb.py per §E (session.md first, then the rest alphabetically, with editor backups filtered).

fields.name: session_id
fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: `<ROLE>-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS` (seconds precision; eliminates same-minute collision by construction).

fields.name: started_at
fields.label: Started At
fields.description: Denormalized from the YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS portion of session_id for sort/filter ergonomics. Read-only — do not write.

fields.name: ended_at
fields.label: Ended At
fields.description: Set when /report session-end or /wake's auto-close closes the session.

fields.name: continues_from
fields.label: Continues From
fields.description: Prior session_id if this session was reached via /wake. Materialized as a CONTINUES_FROM edge by add-to-kb.py at mirror time.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: Merged content of all *.md files in reports/<session-id>/ with session.md first then the rest alphabetically; each prefixed with '## <filename>' (CASE-389 §E).
